# categoryColor

## Summary

Returns the hex color assigned to a guest-category value in `GUEST_CATEGORIES`, defaulting to `#c5a35c` when the value is missing or unknown. The planner uses it to color-code guests by category — category swatches in the Guest card views, seat markers and the category legend in `components/tsp.gts`, and per-category dots in the Table card.

## Import

```js
import { categoryColor } from '../utils/index';
```

## Usage

```js
categoryColor(value: string | null | undefined): string

categoryColor('close-friend'); // '#74b18d'
```
